notes: v3.0.23 - Engine fixes for first-word + multi-word kbd-switch. CHK-193: single-char English articles 'a'(ש) and 'I'(ן) at sentence-start on Heb kbd now stored as pending English; cross-direction retro fires when next word confirms (ש cat → a cat). CHK-184: relaxed Dir1 dict-first gate from >=3 chars to >=3 OR (=2 AND not English word); enables conversion of 2-char Heb words like מה/אם/לא/כי/עם/גם (nv קורה now correctly converts nv→מה). 16/16 unit tests pass; qa_sentences scenario runner CHK-184 case 4 flipped FAIL→PASS. 3 QA cycles CLEAR (Cycle 3 caught a fabricated PostHog key on first build; rebuilt cleanly).
